scope: Forty-arc public LAGEOS CRD/SP3 corpus-level correction and provenance audit. No filter estimates are recomputed.
sp3_analysis_center: NSGF (Space Geodesy Facility, ILRS analysis centre)

forty_arc_hifi.learned_calibrator_verdict: honest negative: the strictly held-out learned calibrator does not beat the higher-fidelity classical reference on the strictly future test week with a CI excluding zero

dbar_external_validation.external_label_definition: adaptation counterproductive iff the adaptive UKF held-out SP3 position RMSE exceeds the fixed-noise UKF held-out SP3 position RMSE by more than the predeclared 5% margin (external precise reference; not the DBAR statistic, not a simulator label)

power.note: Sensitivity rests on the positive class only; with a small positive class its Wilson interval is wide and no inferential claim is made.

claim_boundary.appropriate_use: Use as public-data provenance and measurement-reduction coverage evidence only; do not use as operational POD, centimetre SLR validation, or external validation of the central simulator-bound learned-vs-classical conclusion.
claim_boundary.smallest_defensible_paper_use: A supplement or evidence-index row can state that the existing forty-arc public corpus has complete archived CRD/SP3/EOP coverage and quantified correction/frame magnitudes, while retaining the existing bounded-probe language.
